productTitle: MikroTik CSS610-8P-2S+IN Switch – 8x PoE, 2x SFP+ 10G Cloud Smart
name: MikroTik CSS610-8P-2S+IN
title: MikroTik CSS610-8P-2S+IN
title_extended: MikroTik CSS610-8P-2S+IN Switch – 8x PoE, 2x SFP+ 10G Cloud Smart
short_description: 2x 10G SFP+ Ports, 8x GbE PoE-out Ports, 56 GB Switching Capacity, 802.3af/at, PoE-out budget of 140 W
description: 2x 10G SFP+ Ports, 8x GbE PoE-out Ports, 56 GB Switching Capacity, 802.3af/at, PoE-out budget of 140 W

detailed_description.heading: Networking for Various Environments
detailed_description.text: Elevate your networking with the MikroTik CSS610-8P-2S+IN, a true powerhouse designed to cater to diverse setups, from home networks and small offices to larger establishments like hotels and call centers. This switch boasts an impressive combination of features, scalability potential, and affordability, making it a game-changer in the world of networking.

detailed_description.heading: High-Performance Connectivity
detailed_description.text:
Featuring two 10 Gigabit SFP+ ports and eight Gigabit Ethernet ports with 802.3af/at PoE-out capability, the CSS610-8P-2S+IN provides a versatile solution for various networking requirements.

The SFP+ ports offer fast data transfer rates of 10 gigabits per second (10 Gbps), making it perfect for bandwidth-intensive applications. What's more, these ports enable the use of fiber optic connections, ensuring high-speed and long-distance data transmission. Versatility is key here, as SFP+ ports support various types of transceivers to meet different network requirements. Whether it's in an enterprise data center, a multimedia production setting, or for long-distance connectivity, these ports provide exceptional speed and adaptability.

detailed_description.heading: User-Friendly SwOS
detailed_description.text:
The CSS610-8P-2S+IN is powered by SwOS (SwitchOS), a lightweight and user-friendly operating system. SwOS simplifies network management, offering an intuitive web browser interface that allows users to configure and monitor their network with ease. This user-friendliness is particularly beneficial for users with varying levels of networking expertise.

SwOS also equips the switch with an array of advanced features, including port-to-port forwarding, broadcast storm control, MAC filtering, VLAN configuration, traffic mirroring, bandwidth control, and the ability to adjust certain MAC and IP header fields. These features empower network administrators to customize their network, optimize performance, and enhance security effortlessly.

detailed_description.heading: Exceptional PoE Capability
detailed_description.text: One of the standout features of the CSS610-8P-2S+IN is its robust Power-over-Ethernet (PoE) capability. With a total PoE-out budget of 140 watts, this switch can power a multitude of PoE-enabled devices, making it perfect for demanding scenarios like hotels, conference halls, and call centers. The advantages of PoE are numerous—it simplifies device installation, offers flexibility in device placement, and allows for centralized power management. You can power IP phones, security cameras, access points, and more, all through PoE, eliminating the need for separate power cables. With centralized power management, network administrators can monitor and control PoE-powered devices remotely, enhancing overall network management.

detailed_description.heading: Cost-Effective Scalability
detailed_description.text: Scalability is no longer a concern with the CSS610-8P-2S+IN. Its affordability allows you to expand your network without straining your budget. Whether you need switches on every floor of a building or want to connect various devices without compromising on performance, this switch offers a cost-effective solution.

comments.name: Angelo
comments.text: One of the most versatile switch I ever used!
